untranslatable_reason: Signal requires: (1) Three-candle pattern detection algorithm not available in indicator set; (2) 12-month range position calculation (Low/Middle/High zones) requires historical extrema lookup beyond provided indicators; (3) Context-dependent reversal vs continuation logic with probabilistic outcomes (35%R/65%C, etc.) cannot be expressed as deterministic rule conditions; (4) 'Yearly range position' and 'one-third of yearly high' thresholds require custom range calculation functions
translation_notes: Partial translation using Donchian channels as proxy for range extremes and body direction as pattern approximation. The original signal's core logic—probabilistic reversal/continuation classification based on position within 12-month range—requires machine learning or custom backtester functions. Recommend implementing as custom signal module rather than standard rule engine.
